title: My Server Is Compatible
description: Client-side mod to disable Forge's "Incompatible FML Modded Server" message.
body: Sometimes when you make a server (mainly when you use a proxy like BungeeCord), Forge shows an **"Incompatible FML modded server"** message even if you're still able to join the server. This can end up confusing some players. So I made this Client-Side mod, which completely disables these messages. Default: With this mod:
